containerPort.description: The port number on the container bound to the host port.

hostPort.description: The port number on the container instance to reserve for the container.

protocol.description: The protocol used for the port mapping.

name.description: The name to use for the port mapping (used with Service Connect).

appProtocol.description: The application protocol used for the port mapping.

containerPortRange.description: The port number range on the container.
